allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; reg=json.load\(sys.stdin\); caps=[c.get\('id'\) for s in ['built_in_capabilities','self_generated_capabilities'] for c in reg.get\(s,{}\).get\('capabilities',[]\)] ; print\(caps\)")
